---
title: "MORE_naive2"
author: "Andrea"
date: "2026-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# LIBRERÃAS 

```{r}
# LibrerÃ­as principales para aplicar MORE y cargar CollecTRI
library(MORE)
library(decoupleR)

# ManipulaciÃģn y visualizaciÃģn de datos
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

# Dependencias utilizadas por MORE
library(ropls)
library(furrr)
library(purrr)
library(igraph)
library(ltm)
library(psych)
library(MASS)
library(glmnet)
library(car)
```



# PREPARACIÃN DATOS DE ENTRADA

## CARGA DE DATOS

Cargamos la red COllecTRI:
```{r}
# Ruta base local del proyecto
ruta_base <- "/Users/andya/Escritorio/TFG"
ruta_datos <- file.path(ruta_base, "Datos")
ruta_figuras <- file.path(ruta_base, "IMAGENES")

# Cargamos la red reguladora CollecTRI.
# Esta red se utiliza para definir las asociaciones conocidas TF-target.
collectri_net <- decoupleR::get_collectri(
  organism = "human",
  split_complexes = FALSE
)

# Cargamos las actividades de los factores de transcripciÃģn estimadas con VIPER.
# Estas matrices se utilizarÃĄn como regulatoryData en MORE.
TF_activity_auto <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "auto_TF_score_collectri.csv"))
TF_activity_mono <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "mono_TF_score_collectri.csv"))

# Cargamos los TFs diferencialmente activos identificados con msVIPER.
TF_msVIPER_auto <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "msViper_auto_TFs.csv"))
TF_msVIPER_mono <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "msViper_mono_TFs.csv"))

# Cargamos los resultados de dynGENIE3 para compararlos posteriormente con MORE.
dynGENIE3_auto <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "GRN_auto_withTFs_msViper_TFs_001.csv"))
dynGENIE3_mono <- read.csv(file.path(ruta_datos, "GRN_mono_withTFs_msViper_TFs_001.csv"))
```



# PREPARACIÃN MATRICES `targetData` y `regulatoryData`

```{r}
# UniÃģn de TFs diferencialmente activos identificados con msVIPER
TFs_msViper <- unique(c(TF_msVIPER_auto$x, TF_msVIPER_mono$x))
length(TFs_msViper)
```

```{r}
TF_activity_auto <- as.data.frame(TF_activity_auto)
rownames(TF_activity_auto) <- TF_activity_auto$X
TF_activity_auto$X <- NULL
TF_activity_auto[] <- lapply(TF_activity_auto, as.numeric)
TF_activity_auto <- as.matrix(TF_activity_auto)
```

```{r}
TF_activity_mono <- as.data.frame(TF_activity_mono)
rownames(TF_activity_mono) <- TF_activity_mono$X
TF_activity_mono$X <- NULL
TF_activity_mono[] <- lapply(TF_activity_mono, as.numeric)
TF_activity_mono <- as.matrix(TF_activity_mono)
```

```{r}
# Creamos una matriz para autologous con todos los TFs diferencialmente activos.
# Los TFs que no estÃĐn presentes en la matriz VIPER se rellenan con cero.
autoTFs_completo_da <- matrix(0, nrow = length(TFs_msViper), ncol = ncol(TF_activity_auto),
                           dimnames = list(TFs_msViper, colnames(TF_activity_auto)))

monoTFs_completo_da <- matrix(0, nrow = length(TFs_msViper), ncol = ncol(TF_activity_mono),
                           dimnames = list(TFs_msViper, colnames(TF_activity_mono)))

# Identificamos quÃĐ TFs diferencialmente activos estÃĄn presentes en cada condiciÃģn.
genes_existentes_autoTFs <- intersect(TFs_msViper, rownames(TF_activity_auto))
genes_existentes_monoTFs <- intersect(TFs_msViper, rownames(TF_activity_mono))

# Rellenamos las matrices con los valores reales disponibles.
autoTFs_completo_da[genes_existentes_autoTFs, ] <- as.matrix(TF_activity_auto[genes_existentes_autoTFs, ])
monoTFs_completo_da[genes_existentes_monoTFs, ] <- as.matrix(TF_activity_mono[genes_existentes_monoTFs, ])

# Unimos ambas condiciones en una Ãšnica matriz de actividad reguladora.
TF_score_collectri_DA <- cbind(autoTFs_completo_da, monoTFs_completo_da)

dim(TF_score_collectri_DA) 
```


Una vez obtenida la matriz conjunta de actividad reguladora vamos a construir las matrices de `targetData`y `regulatoryData`

```{r}
# En el enfoque MORE naive usamos la matriz de actividad de TFs
# tanto como targetData como regulatoryData.

targetData_DA <- TF_score_collectri_DA

regulatoryDataDA <- list(TF=TF_score_collectri_DA)

# Comprobamos que ambas matrices estÃĄn alineadas.
dim(targetData_DA)
dim(regulatoryDataDA$TF)

identical(rownames(targetData_DA), rownames(regulatoryDataDA$TF))
identical(colnames(targetData_DA), colnames(regulatoryDataDA$TF))
```


# CONDITION

Construimos la matriz de condiciÃģn

```{r}
sample_names <- colnames(targetData_DA)

meta <- data.frame(sample = sample_names) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = ifelse(sample %>% str_detect("auto"), "autologous", "monoculture"),
    time      = str_extract(sample, "D\\d+"),          # D1, D4, D8, D11, D14
    patient   = str_extract(sample, "p\\d+"),          # p1, p2, p3 
    replicate = str_extract(sample, "rep\\d+")         # rep1, rep2
  )

meta$time <- factor(meta$time,
                    levels = c("D1", "D4", "D8", "D11", "D14"))

meta
```

```{r}
# Ponemos sample como rownames si no lo estÃĄ ya
rownames(meta) <- meta$sample

# Reordenamos meta segÃšn las columnas de targetData
condition <- meta[colnames(targetData_DA), c("condition"), drop = FALSE]

# Comprobamos que coincide el orden
identical(rownames(condition), colnames(targetData_DA))

head(condition)
```


# ASSOCITATIONS

Ahora vamos a crear associations con la red de CollecTRI.

```{r}
tf_names <- rownames(regulatoryDataDA$TF)
target_names <- rownames(targetData_DA)

associations_TF <- collectri_net %>%
  dplyr::select(target, source) %>%
  dplyr::rename(TF = source) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    TF %in% tf_names,
    target %in% target_names,
    TF != target # importante para que no se autorregule
  ) %>%
  distinct()

dim(associations_TF)
head(associations_TF)

associations_TF <- as.data.frame(associations_TF, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
associations_TF[] <- lapply(associations_TF, as.character)

associations <- list(
  TF = associations_TF
)

```

Hemos obtenido 650 regulaciones que se encuentran en CollecTRI.

```{r}
var_reg <- apply(regulatoryDataDA$TF, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(var_reg)
sum(var_reg == 0)
names(var_reg[var_reg == 0])
```

# APLICAMOS MORE

### MLR
Aplicamos MORE con MLR:
```{r}
set.seed(123) 

moreNaiveDA_MLR <- more(
  targetData = targetData_DA, 
  regulatoryData = regulatoryDataDA,
  associations = associations,    
  omicType = c(TF = 0),            
  condition = condition,           
  minVariation = 0,                
  percNA = 0.2,
  scaleType = "auto",              
  interactions = TRUE,             
  varSel = "EN",                 
  alfa = 0.05,
  vip = 0.8,                       
  method = "MLR",                 
  parallel = FALSE,                
  seed = 123
)
```
```{r}
summary(moreNaiveDA_MLR)
```

Miramos ahora las regulaciones significativas para cada modelo:
```{r}
reg_moreNaiveMLR <- RegulationPerCondition(moreNaiveDA_MLR)

head(reg_moreNaiveMLR)
dim(reg_moreNaiveMLR)
```

Obtenemos 629 regulaciones significativas con MORE y MLR.

```{r}
global_reg_MLR <- moreNaiveDA_MLR$GlobalSummary$GlobalRegulators
global_reg_MLR
```

### PLS

Aplicamos MORE con PLS:
```{r}
set.seed(123) 

moreNaiveDA_PLS <- more(
  targetData = targetData_DA, 
  regulatoryData = regulatoryDataDA,
  associations = associations,    
  omicType = c(TF = 0),            
  condition = condition,           
  minVariation = 0,                
  percNA = 0.2,
  scaleType = "auto",              
  interactions = TRUE,             
  varSel = "Jack",                 
  alfa = 0.05,
  vip = 0.8,                       
  method = "PLS1",                 
  parallel = FALSE,                
  seed = 123
)
```







```{r}
summary(moreNaiveDA_PLS)
```




```{r}
reg_moreNaivePLS <- RegulationPerCondition(moreNaiveDA_PLS)

head(reg_moreNaivePLS)
dim(reg_moreNaivePLS)
```

Hemos obtenido 471 regulaciones significativas con PLS.

```{r}
global_reg_PLS <- moreNaiveDA_PLS$GlobalSummary$GlobalRegulators
global_reg_PLS
```





# COMPARACIÃN DE MÃTODOS

```{r}
n_reg_MLR <- nrow(reg_moreNaiveMLR)
n_reg_PLS <- nrow(reg_moreNaivePLS)

n_reg_MLR
n_reg_PLS
```


```{r}
tabla_resumen_MORE <- data.frame(
  Modelo = c("MORE naive MLR", "MORE naive PLS"),
  Regulaciones_significativas = c(n_reg_MLR, n_reg_PLS)
)

tabla_resumen_MORE
```

R^2

```{r}
r2_mlr_vec <- moreNaiveDA_MLR$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "Rsquared"]
r2_pls_vec <- moreNaiveDA_PLS$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "RsquaredY"]

df_r2 <- data.frame(
  R2 = c(r2_mlr_vec, r2_pls_vec),
  Metodo = rep(
    c("MLR (ElasticNet)", "PLS (Jackknife)"), 
    c(length(r2_mlr_vec), length(r2_pls_vec))
  )
)

col_metodos <- c(
  "MLR (ElasticNet)" = "#E5989B",
  "PLS (Jackknife)" = "#5CC8C6"
)

p_r2_more_naive <- ggplot(df_r2, aes(x = Metodo, y = R2, fill = Metodo)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha = 0.8,
    outlier.color = "#4D4D4D",
    width = 0.55
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_metodos) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(
    title = "ComparaciÃģn de la Bondad de Ajuste (RÂē)",
    
    y = expression(R^2),
    x = ""
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "#4D4D4D"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
p_r2_more_naive
```

```{r}
ruta_figuras <- "C:/Users/andya/OneDrive/Escritorio/CDatos/TFG/IMAGENES"

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(ruta_figuras, "r2_more_naive_DA.png"),
  plot = p_r2_more_naive,
  width = 7,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```

```{r}

rmse_mlr <- moreNaiveDA_MLR$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "RMSE"]
rmse_pls <- moreNaiveDA_PLS$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "RMSE"]


mean(rmse_mlr)
mean(rmse_pls) 
```
```{r}
r2_mlr <- moreNaiveDA_MLR$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "Rsquared"]
r2_pls <- moreNaiveDA_PLS$GlobalSummary$GoodnessOfFit[, "RsquaredY"]


mean(r2_mlr)
mean(r2_pls) 
```

# GRÃFICOS CON MRL


Primero filtramos los TFs de interÃĐs que coinciden con los del paper y los de los resultados.

```{r}
tfs_interes <- c(
  "TP53", "E2F1", "MYC", "NFKB", "RELA",
  "STAT1", "CEBPA", "HIF1A", "SP1",
  "ETS1", "RUNX1", "NR3C1", "CREB1"
)
```

```{r}
subred_DA_MLR <- reg_moreNaiveMLR %>%
  dplyr::filter(regulator %in% tfs_interes)
```



Red de autologous
```{r}
networkMORE(
  outputRegpcond = subred_DA_MLR,
  cytoscape = TRUE,
  group1 = "autologous",
  pc = 0.1,
  save = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
networkMORE(
  outputRegpcond = subred_DA_MLR,
  cytoscape = TRUE,
  group1 = "monoculture",
  pc = 0.1,
  save = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
networkMORE(
  outputRegpcond = subred_DA_MLR,
  cytoscape = TRUE,
  group1 = "monoculture",
  group2 = "autologous",
  pc = 0.1
)
```

# PLOT TEMPORAL
Ahora hacemos el plot temporal, pero primero escogemos las relaciones de interÃĐs:
```{r}
library(dplyr)

relaciones_interes_DA <- reg_moreNaiveMLR %>%
  mutate(
    diff_cond = abs(Group_autologous - Group_monoculture),
    cambio_signo = sign(Group_autologous) != sign(Group_monoculture),
    abs_auto = abs(Group_autologous),
    abs_mono = abs(Group_monoculture),
    max_abs = pmax(abs_auto, abs_mono, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff_cond), desc(max_abs))

head(relaciones_interes_DA, 30)
```

```{r}
tfs_interes <- c(
  "TP53", "MYC", "E2F1", "NFKB", "RELA",
  "STAT1", "CEBPA", "HIF1A", "SP1",
  "ETS1", "RUNX1", "NR3C1", "CREB1"
)

relaciones_interes_DA_filtradas <- relaciones_interes_DA %>%
  filter(
    regulator %in% tfs_interes |
    targetF %in% tfs_interes
  )

head(relaciones_interes_DA_filtradas, 30)
```

```{r}
relaciones_cambio_signo <- relaciones_interes_DA %>%
  filter(cambio_signo == TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_abs))

head(relaciones_cambio_signo, 20)
```


```{r}
target_elegido <- "HOXA10"
regulador_elegido <- "TP53"

samples_more <- colnames(targetData_DA)

regu_vec <- as.numeric(regulatoryDataDA$TF[regulador_elegido, samples_more])
names(regu_vec) <- samples_more

time_vector <- rep(c(1, 4, 8, 11, 14), times = 12)
names(time_vector) <- samples_more

cond_vector <- condition[samples_more, "condition"]
names(cond_vector) <- samples_more

p_tp53_hoxa10 <- plotMORE(
  output = moreNaiveDA_MLR,
  targetF = target_elegido,
  regulator = paste0("TF-", regulador_elegido),
  reguValues = regu_vec,
  cont.var = time_vector,
  cond2plot = cond_vector,
  plotPerOmic = FALSE,
  simplify = FALSE,
  size = 13
)
```

```{r}

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/andya/OneDrive/Escritorio/CDatos/TFG/IMAGENES/plotMORE_TP53_HOXA10_naive.png",
  plot = p_tp53_hoxa10,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```


# PREPARAMOS MATRICES DYNGENIE3 Y COMPARAMOS 

```{r}
weight_cols <- grep("^weight", colnames(dynGENIE3_auto), value = TRUE)

edges_dyn_auto <- dynGENIE3_auto %>%
  mutate(
    weight_mean = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., all_of(weight_cols)), na.rm = TRUE),
    weight_sd = apply(dplyr::select(., all_of(weight_cols)), 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    regulator = regulatory.gene,
    target = target.gene,
    condition = "autologous",
    method = "dynGENIE3",
    weight_mean = weight_mean,
    weight_sd = weight_sd
  ) %>%
  distinct()

head(edges_dyn_auto)
```


```{r}

weight_cols <- grep("^weight", colnames(dynGENIE3_mono), value = TRUE)

edges_dyn_mono <- dynGENIE3_mono %>%
  mutate(
    weight_mean = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., all_of(weight_cols)), na.rm = TRUE),
    weight_sd = apply(dplyr::select(., all_of(weight_cols)), 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    regulator = regulatory.gene,
    target = target.gene,
    condition = "monoculture",
    method = "dynGENIE3",
    weight_mean = weight_mean,
    weight_sd = weight_sd
  ) %>%
  distinct()

head(edges_dyn_mono)
```


```{r}
edges_dyn <- dplyr::bind_rows(edges_dyn_auto, edges_dyn_mono)
head(edges_dyn)
```


```{r}
edges_MORE_MLR_auto <- reg_moreNaiveMLR %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group_autologous), Group_autologous != 0) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    regulator = regulator,
    target = targetF,
    condition = "autologous",
    method = "MORE_MLR",
    effect = Group_autologous
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

dim(edges_MORE_MLR_auto)
```


```{r}
edges_MORE_PLS_auto <- reg_moreNaivePLS %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group_autologous), Group_autologous != 0) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    regulator = regulator,
    target = targetF,
    condition = "autologous",
    method = "MORE_PLS",
    effect = Group_autologous
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()
dim(edges_MORE_PLS_auto)
```

```{r}
edges_MORE_PLS_mono <- reg_moreNaivePLS%>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group_monoculture), Group_monoculture != 0) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    regulator = regulator,
    target = targetF,
    condition = "monoculture",
    method = "MORE_PLS",
    effect = Group_monoculture
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()
```


```{r}
edges_MORE_MLR_mono <- reg_moreNaiveMLR %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group_monoculture), Group_monoculture != 0) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    regulator = regulator,
    target = targetF,
    condition = "monoculture",
    method = "MORE_MLR",
    effect = Group_monoculture
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()
```

```{r}
dim(edges_MORE_MLR_auto)
dim(edges_MORE_MLR_mono)
dim(edges_MORE_PLS_auto)
dim(edges_MORE_PLS_mono)
```



Ahora unimos:
```{r}
edges_MORE_MLR <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  edges_MORE_MLR_auto,
  edges_MORE_MLR_mono
)

edges_MORE_PLS <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  edges_MORE_PLS_auto,
  edges_MORE_PLS_mono
)

head(edges_MORE_MLR)
head(edges_MORE_PLS)
```



MLR vs dynGENIE3

```{r}
overlap_MLR_dyn <- dplyr::inner_join(
  edges_MORE_MLR,
  edges_dyn,
  by = c("regulator", "target", "condition")
)
head(overlap_MLR_dyn)
dim(overlap_MLR_dyn)
```

```{r}
overlap_PLS_dyn <- dplyr::inner_join(
  edges_MORE_PLS,
  edges_dyn,
  by = c("regulator", "target", "condition")
)

head(overlap_PLS_dyn)
dim(overlap_PLS_dyn)
```

```{r}
tabla_dyn_global <- data.frame(
  Comparacion = c(
    "MORE MLR vs dynGENIE3",
    "MORE PLS vs dynGENIE3"
  ),
  Relaciones_MORE = c(
    nrow(edges_MORE_MLR),
    nrow(edges_MORE_PLS)
  ),
  Relaciones_dynGENIE3 = c(
    nrow(edges_dyn),
    nrow(edges_dyn)
  ),
  Relaciones_compartidas = c(
    nrow(overlap_MLR_dyn),
    nrow(overlap_PLS_dyn)
  ),
  Porcentaje_sobre_MORE = c(
    nrow(overlap_MLR_dyn) / nrow(edges_MORE_MLR) * 100,
    nrow(overlap_PLS_dyn) / nrow(edges_MORE_PLS) * 100
  ),
  Porcentaje_sobre_dynGENIE3 = c(
    nrow(overlap_MLR_dyn) / nrow(edges_dyn) * 100,
    nrow(overlap_PLS_dyn) / nrow(edges_dyn) * 100
  )
)

tabla_dyn_global
```


Y ahora vemos resumen por condiciÃģn (`autologous` y `monoculture`)

```{r}
resumen_por_condicion <- function(edges_more, edges_dyn, overlap, nombre_modelo) {
  
  n_more <- edges_more %>%
    dplyr::count(condition, name = "Relaciones_MORE")
  
  n_dyn <- edges_dyn %>%
    dplyr::count(condition, name = "Relaciones_dynGENIE3")
  
  n_overlap <- overlap %>%
    dplyr::count(condition, name = "Relaciones_compartidas")
  
  n_more %>%
    dplyr::left_join(n_dyn, by = "condition") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(n_overlap, by = "condition") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Relaciones_compartidas = tidyr::replace_na(Relaciones_compartidas, 0),
      Porcentaje_sobre_MORE = Relaciones_compartidas / Relaciones_MORE * 100,
      Porcentaje_sobre_dynGENIE3 = Relaciones_compartidas / Relaciones_dynGENIE3 * 100,
      Modelo = nombre_modelo
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Modelo,
      condition,
      Relaciones_MORE,
      Relaciones_dynGENIE3,
      Relaciones_compartidas,
      Porcentaje_sobre_MORE,
      Porcentaje_sobre_dynGENIE3
    )
}
```

```{r}
tabla_MLR_dyn_condition <- resumen_por_condicion(
  edges_more = edges_MORE_MLR,
  edges_dyn = edges_dyn,
  overlap = overlap_MLR_dyn,
  nombre_modelo = "MORE MLR"
)

tabla_PLS_dyn_condition <- resumen_por_condicion(
  edges_more = edges_MORE_PLS,
  edges_dyn = edges_dyn,
  overlap = overlap_PLS_dyn,
  nombre_modelo = "MORE PLS"
)

tabla_dyn_condition <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tabla_MLR_dyn_condition,
  tabla_PLS_dyn_condition
)

tabla_dyn_condition
```
```{r}
overlap_MLR_dyn %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(weight_mean)) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    condition,
    regulator,
    target,
    effect,
    weight_mean,
    weight_sd
  ) %>%
  head(20)
```


```{r}
overlap_PLS_dyn %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(weight_mean)) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    condition,
    regulator,
    target,
    effect,
    weight_mean,
    weight_sd
  ) %>%
  head(20)
```


# CÃDIGO NUEVO

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

limpiar_edges <- function(df, metodo_nombre) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      regulator = str_remove(regulator, "^TF-"),
      target = str_remove(target, "^TF-"),
      regulator = str_trim(regulator),
      target = str_trim(target),
      edge = paste(regulator, target, sep = "->"),
      method = metodo_nombre
    )
}

edges_naive_mlr <- limpiar_edges(
  edges_MORE_MLR,
  "MORE_naive_MLR"
) %>%
  filter(condition %in% c("autologous", "monoculture")) %>%
  distinct(edge, condition, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
edges_naive_mlr %>%
  count(condition, sort = TRUE)
```


```{r}
naive_mlr_not_dyn <- edges_naive_mlr %>%
  anti_join(
    edges_dyn_all %>% dplyr::select(edge, condition),
    by = c("edge", "condition")
  )
```

```{r}
naive_mlr_not_dyn %>%
  count(condition, sort = TRUE)
```


```{r}
naive_mlr_not_dyn %>%
  arrange(condition, desc(abs(effect))) %>%
  dplyr::select(regulator, target, condition, method, effect, edge) %>%
  head(30)
```


```{r}
naive_mlr_shared_dyn <- edges_naive_mlr %>%
  inner_join(
    edges_dyn_all %>% dplyr::select(edge, condition),
    by = c("edge", "condition")
  )

naive_mlr_shared_dyn %>%
  count(condition, sort = TRUE)
```

```{r}
dyn_not_naive_mlr <- edges_dyn_all %>%
  anti_join(
    edges_naive_mlr %>% dplyr::select(edge, condition),
    by = c("edge", "condition")
  )

dyn_not_naive_mlr %>%
  count(condition, sort = TRUE)
```
```{r}
comparacion_naive_mlr <- tibble(
  categoria = c(
    "Compartidas",
    "MORE_naive_MLR no detectadas por dynGENIE3",
    "dynGENIE3 no detectadas por MORE_naive_MLR"
  ),
  n_autologous = c(
    naive_mlr_shared_dyn %>% filter(condition == "autologous") %>% nrow(),
    naive_mlr_not_dyn %>% filter(condition == "autologous") %>% nrow(),
    dyn_not_naive_mlr %>% filter(condition == "autologous") %>% nrow()
  ),
  n_monoculture = c(
    naive_mlr_shared_dyn %>% filter(condition == "monoculture") %>% nrow(),
    naive_mlr_not_dyn %>% filter(condition == "monoculture") %>% nrow(),
    dyn_not_naive_mlr %>% filter(condition == "monoculture") %>% nrow()
  )
)

comparacion_naive_mlr
```
```{r}
naive_mlr_resumen_cond <- naive_mlr_not_dyn %>%
  dplyr::select(edge, regulator, target, condition, effect) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = effect,
    names_prefix = "effect_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    tipo = case_when(
      !is.na(effect_autologous) & is.na(effect_monoculture) ~ "EspecÃ­fica de autologous",
      is.na(effect_autologous) & !is.na(effect_monoculture) ~ "EspecÃ­fica de monoculture",
      !is.na(effect_autologous) & !is.na(effect_monoculture) &
        sign(effect_autologous) != sign(effect_monoculture) ~ "Compartida con cambio de signo",
      !is.na(effect_autologous) & !is.na(effect_monoculture) ~ "Compartida en ambas condiciones",
      TRUE ~ "Sin clasificar"
    ),
    max_abs_effect = pmax(
      abs(effect_autologous),
      abs(effect_monoculture),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_abs_effect))

naive_mlr_resumen_cond %>%
  head(30)
```

```{r}
genes_interes <- c(
  "TP53", "E2F1", "E2F2", "E2F5", "MYC",
  "NFKB", "STAT1", "RUNX1", "ETS1", "CREB1",
  "HIF1A", "FOXO1", "CEBPA", "CEBPD",
  "PAX5", "IRF4", "IKZF1", "PRDM1", "EBF1", "BHLHE40",
  "HOXA10", "ARID1B"
)

candidatas_naive_mlr <- naive_mlr_resumen_cond %>%
  filter(regulator %in% genes_interes | target %in% genes_interes) %>%
  mutate(
    eje_biologico = case_when(
      regulator %in% c("NFKB", "STAT1", "RUNX1", "ETS1", "CREB1") |
        target %in% c("NFKB", "STAT1", "RUNX1", "ETS1", "CREB1") ~
        "SeÃąalizaciÃģn inmune / citoquinas",

      regulator %in% c("TP53", "E2F1", "E2F2", "E2F5", "MYC") |
        target %in% c("TP53", "E2F1", "E2F2", "E2F5", "MYC") ~
        "Ciclo celular / proliferaciÃģn / TP53",

      regulator %in% c("HIF1A", "FOXO1", "CEBPA", "CEBPD", "ARNT") |
        target %in% c("HIF1A", "FOXO1", "CEBPA", "CEBPD", "ARNT") ~
        "EstrÃĐs / metabolismo / hipoxia",

      regulator %in% c("PAX5", "IRF4", "IKZF1", "PRDM1", "EBF1", "BHLHE40", "HOXA10", "ARID1B") |
        target %in% c("PAX5", "IRF4", "IKZF1", "PRDM1", "EBF1", "BHLHE40", "HOXA10", "ARID1B") ~
        "Identidad B / diferenciaciÃģn / plasticidad",

      TRUE ~ "Otros"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_abs_effect))

candidatas_naive_mlr %>%
  dplyr::select(
    edge,
    regulator,
    target,
    effect_autologous,
    effect_monoculture,
    tipo,
    max_abs_effect,
    eje_biologico
  ) %>%
  head(30)
```


```{r}
comparacion_candidatas_mlr <- candidatas_naive_mlr %>%
  dplyr::select(
    edge,
    regulator,
    target,
    naive_effect_autologous = effect_autologous,
    naive_effect_monoculture = effect_monoculture,
    naive_tipo = tipo,
    naive_max_abs_effect = max_abs_effect,
    naive_eje_biologico = eje_biologico
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    candidatas_naive_mlr %>%
      dplyr::select(
        edge,
        naive_effect_autologous = effect_autologous,
        naive_effect_monoculture = effect_monoculture,
        naive_tipo = tipo,
        naive_max_abs_effect = max_abs_effect,
        naive_eje_biologico = eje_biologico
      ),
    by = "edge"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    aparece_en = case_when(
      !is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) & !is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) ~ "Naive y naive",
      !is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) & is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) ~ "Solo naive",
      is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) & !is.na(naive_max_abs_effect) ~ "Solo naive",
      TRUE ~ "Sin clasificar"
    ),
    max_effect_global = pmax(
      naive_max_abs_effect,
      naive_max_abs_effect,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    factor(aparece_en, levels = c("Naive y naive", "Solo naive", "Solo naive")),
    desc(max_effect_global)
  )

comparacion_candidatas_mlr %>%
  head(40)
```
